name: Location
description: Semantic wrapper for the building's spatial location.

name: GEM taxonomy
description: Structural classification drawn from the GEM Building Taxonomy v3 subset shipped with this demo.

name: Heritage status
description: Listed, candidate or non-listed heritage designation.

name: Service roles
description: Critical-service roles the building fills (shelter, hospital, school, fire station, etc.). Repeatable.

name: Cluster type
description: Urban cluster category (CBD, residential, industrial, heritage, coastal, port, peri-urban).

name: Height dimension
description: Semantic wrapper holding the building-height measurement.

name: Production time-span
description: Time-span attached to the construction event.
